Items.Description:
一旦暂停，vaib215 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，vaib215 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，vaib215 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 vaib215 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 vaib215 的方法：

降低 vaib215 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 vaib215 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Once suspended, vaib215 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, vaib215 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by vaib215 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If vaib215 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag vaib215:

Make all posts by vaib215 less visible

vaib215 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging vaib215 will restore default visibility to their posts.
